title: Rustic Brown Wood Christmas Log Slice Coaster Set - 1.2cm x 9.5cm (Pack of 4) - Christmas-Themed Drink Holders - Premium Quality & Unique Design - Perfect for Festive Gatherings
features: UNIQUE CHRISTMAS-THEMED DESIGN: Bring the festive spirit to your table with our rustic brown wood christmas log slice coaster set featuring the cheerful message "Eat, drink and be merry" on each piece.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Made from high-quality, durable wood, these charming coasters are designed to handle hot and cold drinks alike, ensuring your surfaces stay protected, season after season.
IDEAL SIZE: Each coaster measures 1.2cm x 9.5cm, making them just the right size to hold your favorite mugs and glasses without taking up too much space on your table or countertop.
PERFECT FOR FESTIVE GATHERINGS: This pack of 4 log slice coasters is the ideal accessory for your holiday parties, family dinners, or simply adding some festive cheer to your everyday life.

A FABULOUS GIFT IDEA: These charming coasters make a beautiful and practical gift for friends, family, and colleagues who appreciate a touch of rustic charm and whimsy during the holiday season. Gift wrapped and ready for giving!
